name: seo-for-ai
description: Audit and optimize websites for AI agent visibility (AEO/GEO) alongside classic technical SEO: bot-readable HTML, JSON-LD, robots.txt / bot policy, llms.txt, FAQ extractability, and the 6-step audit workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Audit & optimize sites for AI-agent visibility (AEO/GEO).
interface.longDescription: Modern SEO/AEO/GEO playbook as an agent skill — covers static-first render path, semantic HTML, JSON-LD templates, robots.txt / bot policy, Cloudflare AI-bot gotcha, 2 MB byte cap, FAQ extractability patterns, Bing Webmaster Tools, IndexNow, llms.txt, NLWeb, MCP, and the agent-payments roadmap (x402 / ACP / AP2 / UCP). Includes the `/seo-audit` slash command.
defaultPrompt: Review my JSON-LD on the pricing page.
Why isn't ChatGPT citing our docs?
Set up llms.txt for this SDK.
Check our robots.txt — Cloudflare might be blocking AI bots.
